news.title: Ola Electric plans to raise ₹2,000 crore for its battery division, Ola Cell Technologies.

news.title:
Ola Electric Q3 revenue at ₹470 Cr, gross margin 34.3%, deliveries 32,680.
Capex completion shifts focus to scaling, profitability; service gaps acknowledged.
news.summary:

news.title:
Goldman Sachs downgraded Ola Electric Mobility to 'Neutral', cutting its price target by 50% to ₹26.
Ola Electric's market cap fell to ₹11,269 crore; stock down 66% from IPO price and 32% YTD.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs downgraded Ola Electric Mobility to 'Neutral', cutting its price target by 50% to ₹26.
Ola Electric's market cap fell to ₹11,269 crore; stock down 66% from IPO price and 32% YTD.

news.title: Ola Electric plans to cut its store count to 550 by March end.
news.summary: Ola Electric plans to cut its store count to 550 by March end.

news.title:
Ola Electric shares rose nearly 4% after Bombay HC stayed CEO Bhavish Aggarwal's arrest warrant.
This development ended a 4-day decline in Ola Electric's stock performance.
news.summary:
Ola Electric shares rose nearly 4% after Bombay HC stayed CEO Bhavish Aggarwal's arrest warrant.
This development ended a 4-day decline in Ola Electric's stock performance.

news.title:
Ola Electric's Co-CEO cites service issues impacting sales but foresees regional recovery.
He projects ₹15,000-20,000 Cr revenue potential with improved service and full capacity.
news.summary:
Ola Electric's Co-CEO cites service issues impacting sales but foresees regional recovery.

news.title:
Bombay High Court in Goa halts warrant against Ola Electric's CEO.
The warrant was issued earlier by the Consumer Commission.
news.summary:
Bombay High Court in Goa halts warrant against Ola Electric's CEO.
The warrant was issued earlier by the Consumer Commission.

news.title:
Ola Electric's volumes declined due to service execution gaps impacting customer confidence.
Bhavish Aggarwal noted delays in service accessibility and turnaround times affected brand trust.
news.summary:

news.title:
Ola Electric shares fell nearly 3%, hitting a 52-week low.
The decline follows ongoing brokerage downgrades.

news.title:
Ola Electric's Q3 loss narrows to ₹487 Cr from ₹564 Cr YoY.
Revenue declines 55% to ₹470 Cr; EBITDA loss improves to ₹270 Cr YoY.
news.summary:

news.title:
Ola Electric reports record gross margin at 34.3%, up 15.7 pp YoY.
Gigafactory capacity aimed at 6 GWh by Mar '26; service backlog halved.

news.title:
India's startups are opting for early IPOs due to tighter private funding, better governance, and mature public markets.
Listings like Ola Electric, MobiKwik, and FirstCry highlight shifts to sustainability, profitability, and public market alignment.
news.summary:
India's startups are opting for early IPOs due to tighter private funding, better governance, and mature public markets.

news.title:
